results.check_summary: The strongest full-prefix fit is the phase-specific delta continuation proposed by E03; alternatives lack complete-prefix support.
E01 provides the best-supported continuation of the observed mostly decrement-two phase behavior.
The candidate set is weakly supported; E02 is the most coherent alternating-stream continuation.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of alternating polynomial or affine streams.

results.check_summary: Odd-position values decrease by four and even-position values increase by four exactly.
Odd subsequence decrements increase by one; even subsequence differences double negatively.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of polynomial and affine streams.

results.check_summary: E06 gives the strongest residue-class continuation among the proposals.
The three-stream decomposition in E04 best explains the full prefix and continuation.
results.rule_summary: INTERLEAVE of three polynomial or affine streams.

results.check_summary: No proposal is strongly verified; E01 is retained as the least-assumptive residue-class continuation.
E01 is the best-supported period-three continuation of the late-prefix phase pattern.
The proposals are weak; E01 is retained as the most plausible modular-affine continuation.
Growing blocks have lengths two through five, with the next block step continuing at negative thirty-seven.
results.rule_summary: GROWBLOCK with linearly changing block steps.

results.check_summary: E01 is the best available three-phase subsequence continuation, though support is limited.
